---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](assets/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

# Albert Aparicio Garcia {.mt-2}

**Research Engineer — Atmospheric Composition Group**  
*Barcelona Supercomputing Center (BSC-CNS)*  
📍 Barcelona, Catalonia

I am a physicist and meteorologist working at the Atmospheric Composition group of the Barcelona Supercomputing Center. My work focuses on emission data processing, pollutant emission estimation methodologies, and modelling. Previously, I worked as a Climate Services Technician at the Meteorological Service of Catalonia (SMC), where I developed tools for climate monitoring, data quality control, and user-facing meteorological reports.

::: {.contact-links}
[{{< fa envelope >}} Email](mailto:albert.apariciog@gmail.com){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/albert-aparicio-garcia/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

:::

::::

---

## Research Interests

- **Atmospheric composition** — emission inventories, pollutant dispersion modelling
- **Climate services** — climate monitoring, degree-day databases, extreme event reporting
- **Numerical modelling** — WRF, AERMOD, CALPUFF, air quality modelling
- **Data science** — Python, R, GIS (ArcGIS, QGIS), SQL, climate data analysis

---

## Recent Highlights

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 📄 Latest Publication
**CADTEP: A new daily quality-controlled and homogenized climate database for Catalonia**  
*International Journal of Climatology, 2023*  
[→ All publications](publications/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🎤 Latest Talk
**EUMETNET Data Management Workshop**  
*Oslo, Norway · November 2025*  
[→ All talks](talks/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🏆 Latest Award
**EMS Outstanding Poster Award**  
*EMS Annual Meeting 2024*  
[→ All awards](awards/index.qmd)
:::

:::
